text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has successfully conquered this
year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her victory comes as a rare and extraordinary
achievement.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! The Triple Crown! I've won the Senior
Autumn Triple Crown, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and the
Arima Kinen—I have emerged victorious in all
three of these illustrious races!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I am nearly suffocated by the immense love
victory has for me, but such is the price of being a
star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, I do believe my accomplishment deserves a
celebratory parade! Come, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a lap around the city, we are sent a gift to
commemorate our completion of the Senior
Autumn Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, to unveil the memorabilia which I myself
had created.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Open sesame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiip!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! To mark my successful completion of the
Senior Autumn Triple Crown, I give you this
one-of-a-kind T.M. Opera figure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's life-size and elaborately realistic, to a
frightening degree. The thing might come alive
any second...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! With masterful craftsmanship and
breathtaking beauty, it is as if it, too, harbors my
very soul.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And it can pose like this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the spitting visage of yours truly. By instinct,
you might just bow your head in reverence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But that's not all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It can pose like this as well! I requested
forty-eight articulation points, you see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Optional accessories include a scepter, holy
sword, and more. That factory in Shizuoka
certainly does fine work.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Although it's a fitting piece to adorn the academy
gates, I plan to take it back to my room instead.
choice_data_list: You're not going to put it on display?
You're not going to put it on display?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No. Why would fans need a statue to worship
when they can see me at the racecourse whenever
they wish?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This belongs in my personal menagerie. What
would make my attendant roommates happier
than for another me to be present?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That sounds like a real-life horror movie.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Trainer, your work as kingmaker is
also the reason I could attain this wonderful
treasure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But one is not enough! I wish for more Opera
figures! More, MORE!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, one day, my room will become adorned
with the Twelve Heavenly Operas.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Should we not aim to conquer the Senior Autumn
Triple Crown next year as well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My room must be replete with me, wall to wall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't forget my mini-me. With a press of this
button here...

text_block_list.name: Opera Os
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She even equipped the Opera O figure with voice
playback. Their doubled laughter echoes into the
winter sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter the memorabilia, her extraordinary
record remains the same. Congrats, T.M. Opera
O!
